مكتبات الطرف الثالث المضمّنة محلياً (لعمل المحرّر أوفلاين):
Third-party libraries bundled locally (for offline operation):

1. opentype.min.js — opentype.js
   استخراج مخططات الحروف / glyph outline extraction
   MIT License — Copyright (c) Frederik De Bleser
   https://github.com/opentypejs/opentype.js

2. hbjs.js + hb.wasm — harfbuzzjs (HarfBuzz compiled to WebAssembly)
   تشكيل النص العربي الصحيح / correct Arabic text shaping
   harfbuzzjs: MIT License — https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzzjs
   HarfBuzz: "Old MIT" License — Copyright The HarfBuzz Project Authors
   https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz

3. supabase.js — @supabase/supabase-js
   MIT License — https://github.com/supabase/supabase-js
